'''Kyle Pym''' was one of Senator [[Drextar Pym]]'s two sons.

He was the target of an attempted assassination attempt on his father by a former [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commando]].

{{Char-stub}}

*{{JournalCite|7|Countdown to Disaster}} {{1st}}
